generated_assessment.reasoning: This 32-year-old woman combines very high Openness (ideas, aesthetics, values) with very high Neuroticism (anxiety, anger/hostility, self-consciousness) and very high Agreeableness (trust, tender-mindedness). Her inquisitiveness and value openness make her sceptical of any single institutional authority, while her high neuroticism amplifies distrust and perceived threat from mainstream journalism's narratives. Her high agreeableness drives empathy with marginalised voices often sidelined by mainstream outlets. These combine into clear opposition to trusting mainstream journalism, though her intellectual openness stops short of total rejection, placing her around -372.
